title: ScentLib Standard Specification
description: A universal exchange format for digital olfaction data. Compatible with Pyrfume perceptual data, raw sensor signals, and computed ML features.

data_origin.description: Source of the data vector. 'human_perceptual' = Pyrfume-style perceptual ratings. 'sensor_raw' = e-nose hardware output. 'computed_features' = Mordred/Morgan or other cheminformatics vectors. 'simulated' = synthetic test data. 'ai_generated' = model prediction output.

dimension_map.description: Names of each dimension in the data vector. For human_perceptual data, these are Dravnieks descriptor names (e.g. ['ROSE', 'FLORAL']). For sensor_raw, these are sensor channel names (e.g. ['MOS_1', 'MOS_2']). For computed_features, these are feature names (e.g. ['ABC', 'MW']). Can be omitted if feature_set_ref is provided.

feature_set_ref.description: Optional URI or identifier for a shared, externally-defined feature set. Use when dimension_map would be impractically large (e.g. Mordred's 1826 features). Example: 'pyrfume:mordred/features.csv@v1' or 'scentlib:dravnieks_146@v1'. When present, dimension_map MAY be omitted.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of data capture or generation.

environment.description: Physical environment at time of capture. Mandatory for sensor_raw, optional for others.

source_dataset.description: Optional reference to the originating dataset. Example: 'pyrfume:dravnieks_1985', 'pyrfume:keller_2016', 'custom:lab_experiment_A'.

chemical_info.description: Chemical identifiers linking this record to global databases (PubChem, ChEMBL, etc.).

pubchem_cid.description: PubChem Compound ID — primary universal identifier. Used as join key with Pyrfume.

smiles.description: Canonical IsomericSMILES (PubChem standard). Used for RDKit/Mordred featurization.

inchi_key.description: Standard InChIKey — 27-character hash, useful for cross-database deduplication.

iupac_name.description: IUPAC systematic name as returned by PubChem.

layer1_category.description: Global olfactory family. Must match an 'id' from categories_v1.json (e.g. 'floral', 'fruity', 'citrus'). Use lowercase IDs only.

layer2_sub_category.description: Optional sub-category within layer1 (e.g. 'rose', 'lemon', 'cedar'). Should match 'layer2' values in descriptor_map_v1.json.

layer3_descriptor.description: The precise Dravnieks descriptor or sensor-specific label (e.g. 'ROSE', 'Molecule_42', 'Hexanal'). Free-form string.

intensity.description: Normalized overall odor intensity (0 = imperceptible, 1 = maximal). Distinct from the data vector values.

confidence.description: Optional confidence score for the category assignment (0 = uncertain, 1 = certain). Useful for AI-generated labels.

data.description: Normalized data vector (all values 0.0 to 1.0). Length must match dimension_map (if provided). For human_perceptual: Dravnieks scores normalized from [0-5] to [0-1]. For sensor_raw: normalized sensor readings. For computed_features: normalized Mordred/Morgan values.

metadata.description: Arbitrary additional information. Conventions: 'source' (dataset name), 'model_name'+'model_version' for ai_generated, 'n_panelists' for human_perceptual.
